scripts.dev: ENV_FILE_ARGS=""; if [ -f .dev.vars ]; then ENV_FILE_ARGS="--env-file .dev.vars"; elif [ -f ../../.dev.vars ]; then ENV_FILE_ARGS="--env-file ../../.dev.vars"; fi; wrangler types --config wrangler.jsonc $ENV_FILE_ARGS && wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc $ENV_FILE_ARGS
scripts.start: ENV_FILE_ARGS=""; if [ -f .dev.vars ]; then ENV_FILE_ARGS="--env-file .dev.vars"; elif [ -f ../../.dev.vars ]; then ENV_FILE_ARGS="--env-file ../../.dev.vars"; fi; wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc $ENV_FILE_ARGS
scripts.cf-typegen: ENV_FILE_ARGS=""; if [ -f .dev.vars ]; then ENV_FILE_ARGS="--env-file .dev.vars"; elif [ -f ../../.dev.vars ]; then ENV_FILE_ARGS="--env-file ../../.dev.vars"; fi; wrangler types --config wrangler.jsonc $ENV_FILE_ARGS
